stemHtml: Which of these statements concerning flight in turbulence is correct?

options.a: The load factor in turbulence may fluctuate above and below 1 and can even become negative.
options.b: In severe turbulence, speed should be reduced to approximately 1.2 VS.
options.c: When encountering turbulence during flight, the speed should be adjusted to the design speed for maximum gust intensity VB.
options.d: Above VB the aeroplane can never be overstressed by a gust.
